claims.summary: Runtime imports expose hard-reset, recovery, and semantic-lane mechanisms but do not alone prove activation.
claims.disposition: Verified downstream runtime use sites separately and implemented durable canonical headers that distinguish a viewed source window from runtime activation proof.

claims.summary: Felt weight may depend on relational complexity rather than only fill quantity.
claims.disposition: Preserved as an unresolved mechanism hypothesis and felt report; current fill and pressure metrics do not settle it.

claims.summary: Complexity, projection bias, and recovery behavior can be compared without changing the live controller.
claims.disposition: Routed to bounded replay or natural-context study using existing representation, pressure, and lived-state evidence; no live parameter variation is authorized.

claims.summary: Recovery fill boost should add a complexity-weight factor and prioritize decoupling.
claims.disposition: Preserved as an exact Tier 5 operator wait because it changes Minime recovery and controller behavior; source availability grants no approval.
